span.p:
Go Supervisor claim_next_job()
FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Supervisor complete_job()
outputs uploaded via HTTP + registered in cache_manifest

span.p:
Lease: 10 minutes (LEASE_DURATION_MINUTES).
Lease renewer goroutine extends during processing.
Expired leases reclaimed on next poll.

span.p:
ArtifactSyncService polls every
ClusterPollingIntervalSeconds (10s).
Copies outputs from io-cache to artifact-data.
